error.signature: CMake Error: IMPORTED_LOCATION not set for imported target

verdict.summary: Imported target from find_package does not have location property set.

dead_ends.action: Set IMPORTED_LOCATION to a guessed library path
dead_ends.why_fails: Path may not exist on all systems or architectures.

dead_ends.action: Skip the find_package and hardcode library path
dead_ends.why_fails: Breaks portability across different OS and install locations.

workarounds.action: Use find_library to locate the actual library file
Install the missing package and ensure CMake config files exist
workarounds.how: sudo apt install libfoo-dev provides FooConfig.cmake
